case_title: TRIMARK ECONOMY, INC. VS. SOUP FREAKS INC., DBA SOUP FREAKS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-13-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NOT REPORETD. (506)
